Author: Kako5555
Name: FlatMarks
Description: Renders the 8 field waymarks (A/B/C/D and 1/2/3/4) as flat, 2D markers lying on the floor instead of the 3D holographic pillars — like a raid-plan diagram, in-game. Markers follow uneven terrain and stairs. Optionally hides the native pillars (per waymark), and offers per-marker color, size, and opacity controls plus colorblind-friendly color schemes (protanopia, deuteranopia, tritanopia) you can save, import, and export.
